title: capsella pubens
intro: Capsella pubens, also known as shepherd's purse, is a biennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of shepherd's purse include treating various conditions such as coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as helping to reduce bleeding and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of shepherd's purse often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
